commit.subject: LU-19754 kernel: update SLES15 SP7 [6.4.0-150700.53.25.1]
commit.message:
LU-19754 kernel: update SLES15 SP7 [6.4.0-150700.53.25.1]

Update SLES15 SP7 kernel to 6.4.0-150700.53.25.1 for Lustre client.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=sles15sp7 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=sles15sp7 testgroup=full-dne-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=sles15sp7 testgroup=full-dne-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=sles15sp7 testgroup=full-dne-part-3

Change-Id: I1ee0baffd1bbe1c2b73c1ad5d0e476fe0b12e408
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
